company.name: Dorsan Filtration
company.description: Dorsan Filtration manufactures laboratory and industrial filtration products including syringe filters, membrane filters, filter papers, filter cartridges, filter presses, extraction thimbles, air monitoring filters and chromatography filtration products.

contact.quote_note: For pricing, quotes, samples or to become a distributor, use the Request a Quote button or email india@dorsanfiltration.com. We reply within one business day. Free samples are available where possible.

Ángel Romero 9, Lomas del Colli, 45010 Zapopan Jalisco
Route de Tunis, Km 4, 5000 Nabeul, Tunisia

categories.name: Syringe Filters
categories.description: High-performance syringe filters for sample preparation and laboratory filtration.

categories.name: Membrane Filters
categories.description: Microfiltration membrane discs for chromatography and laboratory use.

categories.name: Filter Papers
categories.description: Qualitative, quantitative, folded, microfiber and cytocentrifuge filter papers.

categories.name: Filter Cartridges
categories.description: Industrial depth and pleated cartridges in many materials and sizes.

categories.name: Filter Presses
categories.description: Lab and industrial filter presses and plates.

categories.name: Air Monitoring
categories.description: Filters for PM2.5, PM10, TSP and environmental monitoring.

categories.name: Extraction Thimbles
categories.description: Cellulose, glass microfiber and quartz thimbles for Soxhlet extraction.

categories.name: Chromatography
categories.description: Filtration solutions for HPLC, UHPLC and LC-MS.

membrane_materials.name: Cellulose Acetate
membrane_materials.use: Aqueous biological samples, low protein binding.

membrane_materials.name: Mixed Cellulose Esters
membrane_materials.use: Economical routine aqueous filtration and microbiology.

membrane_materials.name: Nylon
membrane_materials.use: General HPLC, broad aqueous and organic solvent compatibility; higher protein binding.

membrane_materials.name: Polycarbonate
membrane_materials.use: Track-etched membrane for precise surface capture.

membrane_materials.name: Polyethersulfone
membrane_materials.use: Fast aqueous flow, very low protein binding, aqueous buffers and biological samples.

membrane_materials.name: Polypropylene
membrane_materials.use: Chemically inert; prefiltration and broad chemical compatibility.

membrane_materials.name: Polytetrafluoroethylene
membrane_materials.use: Hydrophobic; aggressive/non-aqueous solvents, acids, bases, gas/venting.

membrane_materials.name: Polyvinylidene Fluoride
membrane_materials.use: Hydrophilic; LC-MS, low extractables, low protein binding.

products.name: G Series Syringe Filters
products.description: Polypropylene housing with reinforcing outer ring for high pressure or dense liquids.

products.name: T Series Syringe Filters
products.description: Syringe filters with a polypropylene prefilter to extend filtration volume; ideal for dirty or viscous samples.
products.note: 35 mm size launching soon for higher volumes and challenging samples.

products.name: Membrane Disc Filters
products.description: Disc membranes for mobile phase filtration and sample preparation.

products.name: Qualitative Filter Paper
products.description: Routine filtration paper from virgin cellulose fibers and cotton linters; smooth or creped.

products.name: Quantitative Filter Paper
products.description: Ash-free, acid-treated filter paper for gravimetric/quantitative analysis; high wet strength for Büchner.

products.name: Folded Filter Paper
products.description: High-speed filtration using the entire surface; retention 2-50 µm.

products.name: Microglass Fiber Filter Paper
products.description: 100% binder-free microfiber glass; sub-1 µm retention; air and water analysis.

products.name: Cytocentrifuge Paper
products.description: Absorbent paper for blood cell analysis in cytocentrifuges.

products.name: String Wound Cartridges
products.description: Depth prefilters, 4-50 inch, 1-200 µm, cotton/PP/PET/GF, PP or 304/316L core; process water, plating, chemicals, oils, wastewater.

products.name: Meltblown Cartridges
products.description: PP or Nylon depth cartridges, 9.75-50 inch, 1-200 µm, absolute or nominal, no binding resins.

products.name: Pleated PP Cartridges
products.description: 10-40 inch, 0.2-40 µm, up to 99.98% (Beta 5000) absolute; food & beverage, RO prefilter, chemicals, pharma, API.

products.name: PES Cartridges
products.description: 10-40 inch, 0.2-0.8 µm, FDA compliant, stainless ring for steam sterilization; wines, water, beers, juices, pharma.

products.name: PTFE Cartridges
products.description: Hydrophobic, sterilizing grade (ASTM D6394 SP0112), integrity tested, 0.05-1.0 µm; sterile gas, venting, autoclave/tank vents.

products.name: PVDF Cartridges
products.description: 2-layer high-performance, 0.1-0.65 µm, broad chemical compatibility; food & bev, protein purification, cell cultures, pharma.

products.name: Glass Microfiber Cartridges
products.description: Borosilicate, positively charged, traps bacteria/endotoxins/colloids; FDA; prefilter for absolute membranes.

products.name: Activated Carbon Cartridges
products.description: Granular/block/impregnated cellulose, 9.75-20 inch; removes chlorine, odour, colour.

products.name: PET Synthetic Pleated Cartridges
products.description: 9.75-40 inch, 1-50 µm, max 60C; RO prefilter, pools, chemicals, food & bev.

products.name: Stainless Steel Cartridges
products.description: AISI 304/316L, cylindrical or pleated, REUSABLE, 5-850 µm, up to 650C; high-temp, caustic, corrosive, gas.

products.name: High Flow / Maxpleat / Delta Flow Cartridges
products.description: Large-diameter high-flow cartridges (DLMHFB, DLHF, DLPP) for RO pretreatment, desalination, condensate and cooling water.

products.name: DUTC-Pure Capsule Filters
products.description: Disposable, 100% integrity-testable capsules, 2L-100L, clean-room made.

products.name: Filter Presses (Fortiplates, Bebinox, Pilot 200M, Labinox, Farminox, Mininox)
products.description: Lab and industrial presses in stainless steel for food & beverage and chem-pharma; use filter paper or sheets; gasket-free options available.

products.name: Cellulose Extraction Thimbles
products.description: Single-piece cellulose thimbles for Soxhlet extraction; low-medium temperature.

products.name: Glass Microfiber Thimbles
products.description: High-purity borosilicate glass microfiber thimbles, up to 500C, >99% retention (BS4400).

products.name: Quartz Microfiber Thimbles
products.description: 100% pure silica quartz thimbles resistant up to 1000C.

products: PTFE PM2.5 Filters with PP ring

standards: PTFE cartridges validated to ASTM D6394 SP0112
Air filters to EPA / DIN EN ISO 23210 / DIN EN 14902

faq.question: Which membrane is recommended for LC-MS?
faq.answer: Hydrophilic PVDF, due to low extractables and low protein binding.

faq.question: Which membrane is recommended for aggressive solvents?
Which membrane is suitable for aqueous buffers?
What pore size is commonly used for HPLC?
What pore size is commonly used for sterile filtration?
faq.answer: 0.22 µm, which is sterilising-grade and removes bacteria.

faq.question: What is the difference between G Series and T Series?
faq.answer: G Series has a reinforcing outer ring for high pressure or dense liquids; T Series adds a polypropylene prefilter to extend filtration volume for dirty or viscous samples.

faq.question: Can syringe filters be reused?
faq.answer: No. Syringe filters are single-use to avoid carry-over contamination. Only stainless steel cartridges are reusable.

faq.question: Do you provide free samples?
faq.answer: Samples are available where possible. Share your membrane, pore size, format and volume via Request a Quote or email india@dorsanfiltration.com.

faq.question: How do I get a quote?
faq.answer: Use the Request a Quote button or email india@dorsanfiltration.com with your specifications. We reply within one business day.

faq.question: What syringe filter diameters are available?
faq.answer: 4 mm, 13 mm, 25 mm and 30 mm, with a 35 mm size launching soon.
